positive: Minimalist celestial map design featuring interconnected constellations and abstract zodiac signs. The style should be line-art engraving mixed with modern geometric minimalism. The palette must be deep indigo, cosmic violet, and brilliant metallic gold lines, giving a luxurious and ethereal feel. The composition should be highly centered and contained within a circular or hexagonal frame, ideal for a chest graphic. Include small, stylized geometric representations of moons, planets, and stars as delicate circular or pointillist accents. High contrast, single-color print aesthetic with simulated gold foil detailing. Clean silhouettes, vector-style precision. Highly detailed etching quality. Print-friendly, centered, flat lay view.
